MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
John Brown III, Esq. for Plaintiff: Lombard Plaza Owners' Association, a California Non-Profit Mutual Benefit Corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Pat DeFrates was sworn and examined.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Giannini Glass, Inc. and David Giannini.
Damages in the amount of $190,712.00
Counsel to submitt brief, Point and Authority as to Punitive Damages requested in the amount of $500,000.00 by Oct. 10, 2005.
Matter is continued to Oct. 27, 2005 at 9:00 A.M. in Dept. 218, appearance waived.
